case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA-EDD EMPLYMENT TAX DIST. OFFICE VS GARCIA, YADIRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $897.00 FILED BY STATE OF CALIFORNIA-EDD EMPLYMENT TAX DIST. OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, YADIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1989 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA-EDD EMPLYMENT TAX DIST. OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, YADIRA $897.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $932.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ABOVE INFORMATION IS FOR THE PURPOSE OF ENTRY IN COMPUTER.CASE HEARD BY JUDGE CHOPPELAS ON 3/17/89 AT 8:00 AM.
WRIT ISSUED ON AUG. 20, 1997 PER PHONE CALL TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPT. WRIT ISSUED MANUALLY.
MEMO OF CREDIT $292.58, INTEREST $599.25 AND COSTS $18.00 FILED AUG. 20, 1997.
WRIT ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FOR $1,263.67 ON AUG. 20, 1997.
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, YADIRA HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED.
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION GRANTED IN PART. DEFT'S EARNINGS SHALL BE WITHHELD IN THE AMOUNT OF $50 PER MONTH.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF NOV-10-1997, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, YADIRA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION;CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM SHERIFF OF SAN MATEO COUNTY.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, YADIRA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED 8-20-97 (SMATEO) RETURNED PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE AMOUNT OF $540.00
